source: World headlines summarised, then written in spoken Palestinian by Claude. NOT native-validated.
note: Written the way you'd TELL someone the news over coffee, not the way a newsreader would read it. That is deliberate: newsreader Arabic is fuṣḥā, which is not the goal (LEARNING-SYSTEM §1).

sentences.ar: الصين عملت تحالف جديد للذكاء الاصطناعي مع دول تانية.
sentences.en: China has formed a new AI alliance with other countries.

sentences.ar: بالكونغو، مرض الإيبولا عم بينتشر أسرع من اللي توقعوا.
sentences.en: In Congo, Ebola is spreading faster than they expected.

sentences.ar: بكييف، ناس كتير نزلوا عالشارع لما الرئيس حاول يشيل وزير الدفاع.
sentences.en: In Kyiv, many people took to the streets when the president moved to remove the defence minister.

sentences.ar: ببانكوك، صار حريق كبير بمطعم ومات أكتر من تلاتين واحد.
sentences.en: In Bangkok, a large fire broke out at a venue and more than thirty people died.

sentences.ar: التوتر بين إيران وأمريكا لسه عم بيزيد.
sentences.en: Tension between Iran and America continues to rise.
